statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: Windows Terminal settings
links.summary: Microsoft documents Windows Terminal through settings.json and documented settings pages. This research pass did not capture a primary registry contract for DeveloperMode or EnableDebugTap.

links.title: Ghidra headless raw-memory scan of TerminalApp.dll
links.summary: Headless Ghidra raw-memory scans of TerminalApp.dll wrote NO_MATCH for DeveloperMode and EnableDebugTap, so the flags are not present as plain strings in the imported binary.

links.title: WPR capture of Windows Terminal launch
links.summary: GeneralProfile WPR capture of wt.exe launch captured the startup sequence for manual trace review. This is supporting runtime context, not registry-semantic proof.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider writes DeveloperMode = 1 and EnableDebugTap = 1 under HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows Terminal.
